question: What does Overview say under IIU STATUTES 2006?
answer: FACULTIES:- 1.1 The University shall have the following Faculties: i) The Faculty of Islamic Studies (Usuluddin); ii) The Faculty of Shariah and Law; iii) The Faculty of Management Sciences; iv) The Faculty of Education; v) The Faculty of Social Sciences; 1.2 Each Faculty shall have a Board of Faculty. DEAN: 2.1 There shall be a Dean of each Faculty. 2.2 The Dean shall be appointed by the Rector for three years.

question: What does TEACHING DEPARTMENTS say under IIU STATUTES 2006?
answer: 3.1 There shall be a Teaching Department for each subject.

question: What does STUDENTS DISCIPLINE COMMITTEE say under IIU STATUTES 2006?
answer: 12.1 There shall be a Student Discipline Committee. 12.5 The functions shall be to deal with all cases of student discipline.

question: What does BUDGET AND ACCOUNTS say under IIU STATUTES 2006?
answer: 14.1 There shall be a common Fund of the University. AUDIT: 15.1 There shall be an Internal Audit of the University.

answer: 1. In these Statutes the following expressions apply: i) Ad-hoc Appointment means temporary appointment.
